generation.full_text:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Write the next recursive transformation of the text below. Let the semantic direction be guided by these latent anchor tokens.

LATENT DIRECTION TOKENS: it, were, The, are, had, that, was, have, the, in, has, is

TEXT:
The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions. He then studied their grammar to understand how they read from them so he could use his knowledge when necessary to create new literary works or take back control over an existing one. His findings would help guide human culture with ideas about what should make sense for each people group as well (for example, whether there needs "to work out" which members must belong who need separate homes). These results revealed why some cultures don't accept certain symbols; others view this symbolically while other nations do not—indeed reject meanings such things like 'carnation' because we want our friends and neighbors at least partly responsible for those living nearby but also see

TEXT:
He then studied their grammar to understand how they read from them so he could use his knowledge when necessary to create new literary works or take back control over an existing one. His findings would help guide human culture with ideas about what should make sense for each people group as well (for example, whether there needs "to work out" which members must belong who need separate homes). These results revealed why some cultures don't accept certain symbols; others view this symbolically while other nations do not—indeed reject meanings such things like 'carnation' because we want our friends and neighbors at least partly responsible for those living nearby but also see ourselves treated badly without all parties involved being accountable within society more than once!
